description: Manually defined high-volatility windows from SPY price history and VIX data. Whaley (2009) identifies two VIX>34 periods in our data range (Aug-Oct 2002, Sep-Oct 2008) but our detector uses realized vol percentile, not VIX directly. These windows are from financial news and SPY drawdown history.
dateSource: SPY price history, VIX history via Yahoo Finance, financial news reporting.
passCriterion: Detector fires within 10 trading days of window start. 90% coverage is a regression gate.
